/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/renderer/buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/renderer/commands.c.o CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/renderer/compute_pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/renderer/descriptors.c.o CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/renderer/graphics_pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/renderer/image.c.o CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/renderer/renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/vk_app.dir/src/renderer/swapchain.c.o -o vk_app  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib /usr/local/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib
